summary: Fixed HardwareTab to use template data: resSelect (ScreenPresets), cpuSelect/memSelect (HardwareTiers) all populated from template via cascade. Select.setOptions now also syncs display text. HardwareTab controls start with placeholder 'Loading...' and are populated by modal's _cascadeOsChange. All cascade updates correctly wired in requestAnimationFrame. Build 0 errors.
current_status: HardwareTab: all Select controls (CPU, Memory, Resolution, WebGL Vendor/Renderer) now populate from template fingerprint data when OS changes. Screen Resolution presets available for preview even in Random mode. Build 0 errors.
